query: mixed white balance interior window photograph orange blue contrast
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — mixed white balance interior, dual color temperatures clash

response.objective_caption: A child wearing a blue coat and yellow boots stands with their back to the viewer, right hand extended toward an open doorway emitting bright yellow light. Adult figures are visible on both sides of the child, and the surrounding walls are a deep blue with a circular emblem on the right. A patch of white material covers the floor near the threshold.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A child in a blue coat and yellow boots reaches toward a brightly lit open doorway, surrounded by ghosted, overlapping adult figures created through double exposure. The surreal composition layers multiple translucent scenes into a single dreamlike frame, blending the central subject with flanking figures against deep blue walls to evoke an irrational, subconscious atmosphere.
